purpose: Canonical roster of directories in scope for ecosystem-wide processes (distillery sweeps, dispatch watching, README sweeps, retrofits). Consumers read this; per-consumer metadata (e.g. dispatch's public flags) layers in the consumer's own config, never here.

semantics.group: A directory whose immediate children are each independent projects needing their own upkeep (synthetic-worlds: 16 children, 13 loop-enabled as of 2026-07-10, hosts its own parent-scope audit loop). Consumers recurse exactly one level into groups and treat each child as a project.
semantics.derived_status: Harness/loop presence (CLAUDE.md, ./verify, LIBRARY.md, traces/) is DERIVED by consumers at sweep time, never hand-maintained in this file. Un-normalized projects are swept anyway and their facts marked inferred-vs-declared (dispatch) or quarantined-not-rejected (distillery) — normalization is a visible, incremental retrofit chore, never a blocker.
semantics.paths: ~ is the user home directory; identical layout is assumed across machines (ONBOARDING.md).
